top_signals.title: Rising Inflation Is Squeezing the South
top_signals.summary: The "Southern squeeze" is affecting the South, where the cost of living is rising and overall wages are failing to keep pace, with median household income in the South being about $76,000, well below the national average. This is forcing residents and businesses to make tough decisions. Brett Pulley reports for us from Atlanta.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Nike earnings, revenue top estimates even as China sales drop 12%
top_signals.summary: Nike was expected to report another quarter of declining sales as the sneaker giant struggles to regain strength under its turnaround strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chip Stocks Put Up Their Best Quarter Ever With Some Wild Swings
top_signals.summary: Chip stocks are heading for their best quarter ever, extending an extraordinary start to the year driven by insatiable demand for artificial intelligence equipment. But after recent jitters sent the stocks tumbling, investors are wondering how much further the rally can go.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nike Posts Earnings That Surpass Expectations in Latest Quarter
top_signals.summary: Nike Inc. reported better-than-expected results last quarter, a sign that Chief Executive Officer Elliott Hill’s turnaround efforts are gaining some traction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Gain as S&P 500, Nasdaq Notch Best Quarter Since 2020
top_signals.summary: US stocks advanced on Tuesday as the main indexes notched their best quarter in six years and traders parsed the latest economic data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Palo Alto, CrowdStrike wrap best quarter ever as AI threats bolster cyber demand
top_signals.summary: The cybersecurity leaders are leaning into identity security, a critical cyber segment, as AI agents outnumber humans
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
